text:
Kishita (キシタ, Kishita) is one of the performers in Moritonio's traveling circus company. Hunter × Hunter: Hisoka's Past (One-Shot) 

Appearance

Kishita has dark hair and noticeable sideburns. He wears a light-colored bandana that covers most of his hair. 

Personality

Kishita is honest and upfront, quickly apologizing to Moritonio and stating that he doesn’t think he can perform in an upcoming show because of his broken ankle. 

Plot

Hisoka's Past spin-off

With Hisoka watching from afar, Kishita is seen performing a complex juggling act during a performance from the Moritonio Troupe, throwing several pins back and forth with another performer. He then takes in the cheering and applause after the group's successful performance. Later, when Moritonio and Abaki return to their practice area, Kishita is seen lying on the ground and tells them that he lost his footing. Moritonio asks if it hurts, and Kishita quickly apologizes to him, guessing that it's broken and adding that he doesn't think he can perform his act. 

Abilities & Powers

Kishita is a skilled juggler in the Moritonio Troupe. During a discussion with Hisoka, Abaki reveals that none of the Troupe members besides herself had enough potential to learn Nen.
